name: get_x_narrative_alpha
description: Real-time X/Twitter sentiment intelligence via Grok API + x_search. Master Chris Camillo's Social Arbitrage: spot cultural trend shifts, narrative velocity, and contrarian signals BEFORE Wall Street for trading alpha. Returns structured JSON: sentiment score (-1.0 to +1.0), narrative velocity (0-100), top trending narratives with strength scores, key influencer positions, and contrarian signals. Use cases: social arbitrage trading, brand monitoring, competitive intelligence, crisis/PR alerts, product feedback, trend detection, social listening, information asymmetry trading. Covers: crypto ($BTC $ETH $SOL DeFi meme coins), stocks ($TSLA $NVDA earnings), macro events (Fed CPI inflation), brands (Nike Adidas Apple Samsung), tech, politics, culture — anything on X. Perfect for social arbitrage bots, Camillo-style AI agents, and TickerTrends-style automation. Live Grok x_search — real-time, not historical or scraped. Pay-per-query via x402 micropayments on Base USDC (0.005 USDC/query). MCP-native discovery. Sub-second cached responses (<400ms), 2-5s fresh. Free preview endpoint for evaluation. Example queries: {"query": "$TSLA cultural sentiment shift"}, {"query": "$BTC"}, {"query": "Nike sustainability backlash"}, {"query": "AI ethics debate"}.

tools.name: get_x_narrative_alpha
tools.description: Real-time X/Twitter sentiment intelligence via Grok API + x_search. Master Chris Camillo's Social Arbitrage: spot cultural trend shifts, narrative velocity, and contrarian signals BEFORE Wall Street for trading alpha. Returns structured JSON: sentiment score (-1.0 to +1.0), narrative velocity (0-100), top trending narratives with strength scores, key influencer positions, and contrarian signals. Use cases: social arbitrage trading, brand monitoring, competitive intelligence, crisis/PR alerts, product feedback, trend detection, social listening, information asymmetry trading. Covers: crypto ($BTC $ETH $SOL DeFi meme coins), stocks ($TSLA $NVDA earnings), macro events (Fed CPI inflation), brands (Nike Adidas Apple Samsung), tech, politics, culture — anything on X. Perfect for social arbitrage bots, Camillo-style AI agents, and TickerTrends-style automation. Live Grok x_search — real-time, not historical or scraped. Pay-per-query via x402 micropayments on Base USDC (0.005 USDC/query). MCP-native discovery. Sub-second cached responses (<400ms), 2-5s fresh. Free preview endpoint for evaluation. Example queries: {"query": "$TSLA cultural sentiment shift"}, {"query": "$BTC"}, {"query": "Nike sustainability backlash"}, {"query": "AI ethics debate"}.

ticker.description: Primary ticker or asset symbol. Examples: "$BTC", "$ETH", "$TSLA", "$NVDA", "$SOL"

event.description: Market event or topic. Examples: "Fed rate decision", "ETH ETF approval", "Bitcoin halving", "NVDA earnings"

query.description: Free-form query combining ticker + event + context. Use this if ticker/event split doesn't fit. Examples: "$BTC after Fed pause", "AI agent economy growth"

time_window.description: Analysis time window. Default: 4h. Use 1h for breaking news, 24h for daily sentiment, 7d for trend analysis.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score to include in results. Default: 0.5. Set higher (0.8+) for high-conviction signals only.

velocity.description: Narrative velocity: score (0-100), trend (accelerating/peaking/decelerating/dormant), hourly mentions

key_drivers.description: Top 3-5 narratives with theme, sentiment, strength (0-100), sample take

contrarian.description: Contrarian signal: hasSignal (bool), consensusDivergence (0-100, higher = more reversal risk), description

manipulationRisk.description: Bot/coordination detection: score (0-100), flags array (bot_amplification, coordinated_accounts, low_organic_ratio, astroturf_patterns)

relatedTickers.description: All tickers/assets mentioned in the narrative (e.g. $BTC, $ETH, $COIN)

sources_summary.description: Brief summary of data sources and volume analyzed

cache_ttl.description: Seconds until this result expires. Use for caching decisions.
